summary: Tested Click Tracking for Influencers (Iteration 37). All features working correctly: /api/r/:code endpoint tracks clicks and redirects with cookie, /api/influencer/analytics returns total_link_clicks, total_code_uses, referral_link, and click_to_order_rate. Frontend displays all new metrics correctly.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - charts still render correctly but warning appears in console

passed_tests: API GET /api/r/TESTITER34 tracks click in influencer_link_clicks collection
API GET /api/r/INVALIDCODE returns 302 redirect to / (graceful handling)
API GET /api/influencer/analytics requires authentication (401 without auth)
API GET /api/influencer/analytics returns total_link_clicks in summary
API GET /api/influencer/analytics returns total_code_uses in summary
API GET /api/influencer/analytics returns chart_data with link_clicks, code_uses, conversions
Frontend: Referral link card visible with full URL
Frontend: 'Clics de Enlace vs Conversiones' chart title visible
Frontend: Chart legend shows 'Clics Enlace', 'Usos Código', 'Conversiones'
Browser: Referral link redirect sets cookie correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Click tracking implementation is correct - stores click_id, influencer_id, code, clicked_at, user_agent, referer, ip_hash
Analytics endpoint correctly separates link_clicks (visits to /r/CODE) from code_uses (code applied at checkout)
Frontend InfluencerAnalytics.js correctly displays all new metrics with proper Spanish labels
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_click_tracking_iter37.py - Created comprehensive test suite for click tracking
seed_data_creation: Used existing test influencer with 6 link clicks tracked
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 click tracking features verified: 1) /api/r/:code endpoint tracks clicks in influencer_link_clicks collection and redirects to /?ref=CODE with cookie. 2) /api/influencer/analytics returns total_link_clicks, total_code_uses, referral_link, click_to_order_rate. 3) Frontend shows referral link card with copy button, separate metrics for link clicks vs code uses, and bar chart with all three metrics. Test influencer has 6 link clicks tracked.

referral_link_redirect.details: GET /api/r/TESTITER34 redirects to /?ref=TESTITER34 with referral_code cookie

click_tracking.details: Clicks stored in influencer_link_clicks collection with click_id, influencer_id, code, clicked_at, user_agent, referer, ip_hash

analytics_total_link_clicks.details: summary.total_link_clicks returns count of link clicks in date range

analytics_total_code_uses.details: summary.total_code_uses returns count of code applications at checkout

analytics_click_to_order_rate.details: summary.click_to_order_rate returns percentage of clicks that result in orders

frontend_referral_link_card.details: Shows 'Tu enlace de referido' with full URL and 'Copiar enlace' button

frontend_metrics_display.details: Shows 'Clics en enlace', 'Usos del código', 'Conversiones', 'Tasa clic→compra'

frontend_chart.details: Bar chart shows 'Clics Enlace', 'Usos Código', 'Conversiones' with legend
